title: M8 performance regression and readiness matrix
summary: Consolidate M8 UI, i18n, accessibility, content, save, performance and M0-M7 regression evidence into a readiness matrix.
acceptance: Consolidates M8 Product UI, Responsive Layout, Localization, Visual Identity, First Playability and Accessibility gate evidence
Consolidates content, mod, long-save, localization and performance evidence
Runs M0-M7 regression gates including quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, bench and 100000-tick M5 scenario
Records Web demo-only and Windows controlled external test verdict preservation
Separates 1.0 readiness evidence from owner-gated public release actions

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Delivered M8 readiness matrix and roadmap updates; preserved Web demo-only and Windows controlled external test verdicts; quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, and 100000-tick M5 headless passed; bench failed twice with blocking regressions in entity-store, m4-core-vertical-slice-long-run, map-dirty, and spatial-index, so M8 remains a performance stop-sign candidate.

changes_requested: High: WM-0126 cannot be verified/integrated as written because required bench evidence records repeated 20% blocking failures while the matrix says those failures block WM-0126 integration. Either revise the artifact/task semantics to make WM-0126 explicitly integrable only as stop-sign evidence that blocks M8 closeout, or complete a performance repair/explanation before verification. Evidence consolidation and platform verdict preservation otherwise checked.

Revised WM-0126 as a verified stop-sign evidence artifact: matrix/report preserve Web demo-only, Windows controlled external test, and owner-gated exclusions; quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, and 100000-tick M5 headless remain documented as pass; bench remains FAIL twice with repeated blocking regressions, which now explicitly block M8 closeout and WM-0127 readiness until a dedicated performance repair/explanation task is reviewed.

verified: No blocking findings in second review. Report and matrix now make WM-0126 integrable as a verified stop-sign evidence artifact while keeping M8 closeout and WM-0127 readiness blocked pending a dedicated performance repair/explanation task; bench remains recorded as two FAIL runs; Web demo-only, Windows unsigned controlled external test, owner gates, and forbidden-path boundaries preserved.

Integrated verified M8 readiness matrix as stop-sign evidence; bench remains two-run FAIL and blocks M8 closeout/WM-0127 readiness pending a dedicated performance repair/explanation task; handoff/taskctl/diff checks passed.

forbiddenPaths: apps/** except test-only evidence updates explicitly required by acceptance
packages/** except test-only evidence updates explicitly required by acceptance

review.summary: No blocking findings in second review. Report and matrix now make WM-0126 integrable as a verified stop-sign evidence artifact while keeping M8 closeout and WM-0127 readiness blocked pending a dedicated performance repair/explanation task; bench remains recorded as two FAIL runs; Web demo-only, Windows unsigned controlled external test, owner gates, and forbidden-path boundaries preserved.

integration.summary: Integrated verified M8 readiness matrix as stop-sign evidence; bench remains two-run FAIL and blocks M8 closeout/WM-0127 readiness pending a dedicated performance repair/explanation task; handoff/taskctl/diff checks passed.
